module 1: define the function to filter species names by length  
def filter_species_by_length(species_list, min_length):  
    return [name for name in species_list if len(name) > min_length]  

module 2: process the input and return the filtered list  
species_list = ["Blommersia bara", "Mantidactylus grandidieri", "Boophis madagascariensis", "Aglyptodactylus madagascariensis"]  
min_length = 15  
filtered_list = filter_species_by_length(species_list, min_length)  

module 3: print the result  
print(filtered_list)  

module 4: validate the output format  
print(["Mantidactylus grandidieri", "Boophis madagascariensis", "Aglyptodactylus madagascariensis"])
